abstracts.abstract: Relating to a requirement for peace officers to report undocumented immigrants to United States immigration and customs.

bill.title: A BILL for an Act to create and enact a new section to chapter 12-63 of the North Dakota Century Code, relating to a requirement for peace officers to report undocumented immigrants to United States immigration and customs.

action.description: Second reading, failed to pass, yeas 41 nays 50
